items.title_en: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争加剧通胀担忧，五月消费者信心创历史新低
items.desc_en: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.
items.desc_zh: 由于美伊战争和油价上涨，人们对价格上涨的担忧加剧，5 月份消费者信心跌至历史新低。

items.title_en: Trump defends DOJ fund after Senate Republicans push back
items.title_zh: 在参议院共和党人反对后，特朗普捍卫司法部基金
items.desc_en: President Trump droppped his $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS in exchange for the DOJ creating a $1.8 billion fund to compensate alleged "lawfare" victims.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统放弃了针对国税局 100 亿美元的诉讼，以换取司法部设立 18 亿美元的基金来赔偿所谓的“法律”受害者。

items.title_en: Watch: Trump will swear in Kevin Warsh as Fed chair as he seeks interest rate cuts
items.title_zh: 观察：特朗普将让凯文·沃什宣誓就任美联储主席，寻求降息
items.desc_en: Despite President Donald Trump's demands for lower interest rates, markets are betting the Fed will stay on hold through most, if not all, of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 尽管唐纳德·特朗普总统要求降低利率，但市场押注美联储将在 2026 年的大部分时间（甚至全部）保持利率不变。

items.title_en: A legacy tech stock is setting up for big gains ahead. How to trade it while hedging risk
items.title_zh: 一只传统科技股正在为未来的大幅上涨做好准备。如何在对冲风险的同时进行交易
items.desc_en: Jeff Kilburg of KKM Financial breaks down how he's trading this tech giant.
items.desc_zh: KKM Financial 的杰夫·基尔伯格 (Jeff Kilburg) 详细介绍了他如何交易这家科技巨头。

items.title_en: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
items.title_zh: 英国科学家正在开发埃博拉疫苗，几个月内即可进行试验
items.desc_en: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.
items.desc_zh: 涉及的稀有埃博拉病毒——被称为本迪布焦（Bundibugyo）——杀死了大约三分之一的感染者，而且目前还没有经过验证的疫苗。

items.title_en: Oil prices head to weekly loss as U.S. and Iran signal progress toward a deal
items.title_zh: 由于美国和伊朗表示达成协议取得进展，油价每周下跌
items.desc_en: The U.S. and Iran have signaled progress in talks to end the war, but the warring sides remain at loggerheads over key issues.
items.desc_zh: 美国和伊朗已表示结束战争的谈判取得进展，但交战双方在关键问题上仍存在争执。

items.title_en: Wall Street is about to enter a historically tough period, and this year it could be even tougher
items.title_zh: 华尔街即将进入历史性的艰难时期，今年可能会更艰难
items.desc_en: June is historically the worst month for all three of the major averages during midterm election years, according to the Stock Trader's Almanac.
items.desc_zh: 根据股票交易者年鉴，六月是中期选举年期间所有三个主要平均指数历史上最差的月份。

items.title_en: Microsoft’s GitHub was positioned to win the AI coding race. Outages got in the way
items.title_zh: 微软的 GitHub 有望赢得人工智能编码竞赛。停电阻碍了
items.desc_en: GitHub's user base has swelled under Microsoft's ownership, but the software repository has fallen behind newer rivals in the world of vibe coding.
items.desc_zh: 在微软的掌控下，GitHub 的用户群不断壮大，但其软件存储库却落后于 Vibe 编码领域的新竞争对手。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.title_en: US pausing $14bn arms sale to Taiwan due to Iran war, navy chief says - Al Jazeera
items.title_zh: 海军参谋长表示，由于伊朗战争，美国暂停了对台140亿美元的军售

items.desc_zh: 半岛电视台称，美国因伊朗战争而暂停对台 140 亿美元军售

items.title_en: Iran war leaves U.S. gas prices at highest levels in nearly four years ahead of Memorial Day
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争使美国天然气价格在阵亡将士纪念日之前达到近四年来的最高水平
items.desc_en: Global oil inventories are declining fast with just four to six weeks until gasoline, diesel and jet fuel prices shoot higher, analysts said.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示，全球石油库存将在短短四到六周内迅速下降，直到汽油、柴油和航空燃油价格飙升。

items.title_en: San Diego’s Muslim community picks up the pieces after mass shooting: ‘We’re just your neighbors’ - The Guardian
items.title_zh: 圣地亚哥穆斯林社区在大规模枪击事件后收拾残局：“我们只是你的邻居”——《卫报》

items.title_en: Stellantis CEO sees opportunity in growing partnerships, bringing China-branded vehicles to North America
items.title_zh: Stellantis首席执行官看到了发展合作伙伴关系的机会，将中国品牌的汽车引入北美
items.desc_en: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa said there could be an opportunity to bring Chinese-branded vehicles into Mexico and potentially Canada, but not the U.S.
items.desc_zh: Stellantis首席执行官安东尼奥·菲洛萨(Antonio Filosa)表示，可能有机会将中国品牌的汽车引入墨西哥，甚至可能进入加拿大，但不会进入美国。

items.title_en: Donald Trump Jr.-backed 'Steroid Olympics' are happening on Sunday. Here's what to expect
items.title_zh: 小唐纳德·特朗普支持的“类固醇奥运会”将于周日举行。这是值得期待的
items.desc_en: Olympic medallists are among 42 athletes competing in the controversial competition, but the Enhanced Games has big product plans beyond the event this weekend.
items.desc_zh: 42 名运动员参加了这项备受争议的比赛，其中包括奥运会奖牌得主，但增强型运动会在本周末的赛事之外还有大型产品计划。

items.title_en: Oversight Chairman Comer launches congressional probe into insider trading on Kalshi, Polymarket
items.title_zh: 监督主席科默启动国会调查卡尔希、Polymarket 的内幕交易
items.desc_en: Congress is ramping up pressure on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket over concerns of insider trading.
items.desc_zh: 由于担心内幕交易，国会正在加大对 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 等预测市场的压力。

items.title_en: Turkish opposition fights court ousting of leaders in ruling boosting Erdogan
items.title_zh: 土耳其反对派反对法院罢免领导人，以支持埃尔多安
items.desc_en: The appeal court declared Özgür Özel's party leadership victory void, further cementing the president's grip on power.
items.desc_zh: 上诉法院宣布厄兹居尔·厄泽尔的党领导胜利无效，进一步巩固了总统对权力的控制。

items.title_en: Trump said he'd 'remember' companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，他会“记住”未申请关税退款的公司。无论如何，他们中的许多人
items.desc_en: Walmart confirmed to CNBC it has sought a tariff refund and plans to use any money it receives back to invest in lower prices for shoppers.
items.desc_zh: 沃尔玛向 CNBC 证实，它已寻求关税退款，并计划将收到的任何资金用于为购物者提供更低的价格。

items.title_en: What the AvalonBay, Equity Residential megamerger means for the apartment industry and rents
items.title_zh: AvalonBay 股权住宅大型合并对公寓行业和租金意味着什么
items.desc_en: The deal will create one of the largest real estate companies in the U.S., with more than 180,000 rental apartments.
items.desc_zh: 该交易将创建美国最大的房地产公司之一，拥有超过 180,000 套出租公寓。

items.title_en: AI used to fake evidence that ended Korean actor's career, say police
items.title_zh: 警方称人工智能曾伪造证据结束韩国演员的职业生涯
items.desc_en: Police are seeking an arrest warrant for a YouTuber who allegedly fabricated evidence to defame actor Kim Soo-hyun.
items.desc_zh: 警方正在对一名涉嫌伪造证据诽谤演员金秀贤的 YouTuber 寻求逮捕令。

items.desc_en: The move for a referendum comes after months of campaigning from a group of separatists.
items.desc_zh: 在一群分离主义者进行了数月的竞选活动之后，公投的举动发生了。

items.title_en: Slow Food founder Carlo Petrini dies aged 76

items.desc_zh: 十多年后，印度-非洲峰会定于下周在德里举行。

items.title_en: Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada
items.title_zh: 艾伯塔省将就是否留在加拿大举行公投

items.title_en: US to send 5,000 more troops to Poland, Trump says

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。

items.title_en: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire

items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.title_en: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
items.title_zh: 谷歌将推出自谷歌眼镜失败以来首款智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.
items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。

items.title_en: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial

items.desc_en: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。

items.desc_zh: 大多数衣服都是在亚洲制造的，但新机器可以将部分工作带回西方。

items.title_en: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
items.title_zh: 卫星和人工智能用于追踪英国刺猬以减缓其数量下降
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望该项目还能帮助找出刺猬在野外寻找食物和交配的障碍。

items.title_en: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
